final_asset_rule: References are style and pose guides only. Do not commit source references, watermarked images, or traced reference material as final gameplay assets.
primary_style_requirement: Realistic top down linework inside a dark cyberpunk apartment. Avoid cute, chibi, mascot, toy, emoji, and childlike design logic.

abc_frame_logic_global.A: Enter, anticipation, or transition into the action. For simple idle, neutral pose.
abc_frame_logic_global.B: Main hold pose or loop frame 1. For simple idle, subtle breathing or weight shift.
abc_frame_logic_global.C: Exit, recovery, or loop frame 2. For movement, part of low frame loop.

reference_folders.intended_use: Cyberpunk apartment room structure, dark wall masses, blue grey floors, cyan and magenta neon, windows, clutter, furniture readability, and collision aware layout logic.
reference_folders.allowed_use_notes: Use for mood, structure, lighting, prop silhouette, and gameplay readability planning. Translate into original sliced production assets.
restrictions: Do not use a flat reference image as final gameplay map.
Do not allow decoration to break object clicking.
Do not let fake wall gaps look walkable.
Do not commit watermarked references as final assets.

reference_folders.intended_use: Primary visual style target for realistic adult male, female, and joint top down sprite poses.
reference_folders.allowed_use_notes: Use pose logic closely for existing poses. For missing A/B/C frames, create realistic transition frames using nearby reference logic.
restrictions: Do not create chibi or toy proportions.
Do not commit watermarked references as final assets.
smart_reuse_notes: Use crouch as transition into and out of yoga or stretching.
Use sitting on bed as the middle frame between standing and lying down.
Use seated chair as the middle frame for laptop, desk, food, and phone actions.
Use one hand on floor and push up poses as get up from floor frames.
Use side, back, curled, and sprawl sleep references as randomized sleep holds.
Use two person bed and couch references as joint state logic.

reference_folders.intended_use: Realistic dog pose logic for a white or off white dog that remains color changeable later.
reference_folders.allowed_use_notes: Use animal anatomy, walk, run, sit, lie, sniff, bark, and sleep reference logic. Keep proportions realistic.
restrictions: Do not commit watermarked references as final assets.

status_notes: The active session did not expose apartment_god_shared_reference_pack.zip. Add actual reference file entries after the pack is available.
